More than 50% of its Evernorth units clients, a group that includes large employers and health plans, cover the drugs for weight management, Chief Financial Officer Brian Evanko said at the Morgan Stanley Healthcare Conference.  Within Cigna Healthcare, its health benefits only segment, which caters more to smaller employers, only about 15% to 20% of clients offer coverage of the medications, he said.
